## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check yumi tests` and `ruff format --check yumi tests` pass
- [ ] `pyright yumi tests` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, CLI flags, or config changed
- [ ] Touched an Edge SDK? The wire protocol stays consistent across the affected languages
